transcript.clean_text: stage four of the tour de suisse 2022 would take the riders from the west of switzerland right to the center 190 kilometers leaving grenken and the national velodrome taking on two categorized climbs finishing in brunon beautiful lake country but that big hill right at the end ready to pose problems again it was just after lunch time when the stage started once more under really hot temperatures non-starter was kespa ascorin after his crash the day before also injuries and problems with the heat forcing tayman ardenman out of the race 50 kilometers to go three-man breakaway's gap was just under two minutes movie star coffee dis and ef all riding to try and drop the thicker lead sprinters and give their fast men who can climb a real chance holmes out there in the breakaway was picking up the points in the intermediate sprints he'd be with johnson's and those two be the last two survivors holmes the last to be brought back the gap evaporating into thin air on that final climb it was a nervous moment for stephen williams the race leader distanced at one point on the final second category climb but he made a really good effort over the top to make sure he got on hugh carthy would be trying his best mark his she would have a go williams eventually making that effort getting straight back on over the top and making sure he'd be in the bunch ef education easy post putting all hands to the pump rig roberto ran joining karthi and trying to set up betty old the likes of kokawa were still there however michael matthews in the bunch as well daryl impe hanging around about the front for the first time in a long while suffering an awful crash last year and getting himself into a great position as the sprint began andreas cronin the white jersey would have a go if he'd taken the bonuses he could have led the race and amburu would have a go as well in the end it would be better who'd lead it out he ran out of gas early but just like the day before a seasoned winner back to his best and at 37 years of age daryl impe winning a bike race for the first time since the pandemic and winning a world tour race for the first time since stage nine of the 2019 tour de france daryl impe with a superb comeback win beating michael matthews and certain crowd of the line for the whole host of other big names in the top ten betiol pitcock harambe all beaten daryl limpy back on top of the world winning on the world tour stephen williams retain the yellow jersey fourth day in the race lead for him as he heads into stage five and the welsh fans with something to cheer about it's a six second lead for williams ahead of cron seven seconds now to thomas and lucknerson with the rest of the top ten at ten seconds stage five takes the riders up into the harder mountains it also takes them into the beautiful italian speaking region of tichino a finishing novadzano very close to cormor very close to the border with italy up and down towards the end a real tough one after 190 kilometers the tour de suisse gets harder and harder and you've got to see stage five live or on demand on gcm plus or discovery plus lots of bike racing on at the moment tour de swiss though not to be missed you
